title: PersonaContextDefinition
description: Rules and materialization settings for the shared AI context document attached to a Persona.

contextSection.description: A section of an entity's documentation that can be included by a persona context rule.

cacheState.description: Current state of the compiled persona context document.

contextRule.description: A dynamic entity-selection rule whose query is evaluated whenever the persona context is materialized.

id.description: Stable identifier used by the persona AI context rule CRUD APIs.

name.description: Unique display name for the rule within this persona.

description.description: Optional explanation of why these entities belong in the persona context.

entityType.description: Entity type selected by the rule, for example table, dashboard, glossaryTerm, page, or metric.

queryFilter.description: Elasticsearch query DSL string emitted by the Explore query builder. Empty selects every entity of the configured type.

filterJsonTree.description: Serialized react-awesome-query-builder JSON tree used only to restore the rule editor UI.

sections.description: Entity-type-specific documentation sections to render. Ignored when fullyRendered is true.

maxAssets.description: Maximum number of matching entities to include from this rule.

fullyRendered.description: Render complete documentation for every matched entity and ignore sections. Fully rendered Data Products also include the context of every contained asset.

alwaysInContext.description: Place this rule before relevance-scoped rules so its content is injected into every request.

enabled.description: Whether the rule participates in materialization.

matchedCount.description: Read-only count of entities currently matched by this rule.

rules.description: Ordered dynamic entity-selection rules. An entity matched by multiple rules is rendered under the first rule only.

maxTotalChars.description: Deprecated alias for characterBudget retained for stored persona compatibility.

cacheTtlSeconds.description: Deprecated alias for cacheTtlMinutes retained for stored persona compatibility.

characterBudget.description: Hard character cap for the compiled Markdown document.

cacheTtlMinutes.description: Number of minutes a compiled context remains fresh before it is regenerated.

lastGeneratedAt.description: Read-only timestamp of the most recent successful compilation.

cacheState.description: Read-only state of the compiled context cache.

lastError.description: Read-only reason the latest compilation failed.
